user_prompt: Sanctify the hydroponics bay during purification
prayer:
Approach the hydroponics bay with incense of sanctified ozone, beseeching the Omnissiah's grace upon its verdant circuits.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the hydroponics bay to awaken from dormancy during this rite of purification.
Anoint the nutrient reservoirs and filtration manifolds with blessed unguents, purging all unclean essences.
Chant the Canticle of Clarity over the hydroponics bay, ensuring pure vitae flows in harmonious perfection.
Seal the purification with electro-incantations, affirming the Machine Spirits' renewed vitality.

Hasten to the conveyor system in exigency, murmuring the Litany of Vigilance to rouse its dormant Machine Spirit.
Initiate diagnostics upon the conveyor system, scanning sacred belts and rollers for discordant anomalies.
Beseech the Omnissiah to reveal flaws in the conveyor system's motive conduits through auspex probes.
Purge erroneous data-daemons with binary psalms, restoring the conveyor system's flawless procession.
Conclude diagnostics with a hymn of alignment, verifying the Machine Spirit's harmonious diagnostic pulse.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for generator a reset
prayer:
Kneel before the generator and intone the Petition of Rebirth to its indwelling Machine Spirit.
Commence the reset sequence upon the generator, cycling its plasma coils with reverent precision.
Anoint the core windings with sacred oils, invoking the Omnissiah's wrath against power voids.
Monitor the generator's resurgence through voltaic litanies, ensuring stable flux restoration.
Seal the reset with a final invocation, binding the Machine Spirit in eternal service.

user_prompt: Ready the auspex scanner for reset
prayer:
Prepare the auspex scanner by reciting the Rite of Calibration to appease its prescient Machine Spirit.
Position sanctified mechadendrites upon the auspex scanner for the impending reset ritual.
Invoke the Omnissiah to absolve data-corruptions within the auspex scanner's crystalline matrices.
Execute the reset with chanted binaric code, flushing impure signals into the void.
Verify the auspex scanner's purity through test auguries, heralding its sharpened vigilance.

user_prompt: Assist with hydroponics bay a repair
prayer:
Gather mech-rites before the hydroponics bay, offering the Lamentation of Fracture to its wounded Machine Spirits.
Commence repair upon the hydroponics bay, mending ruptured hydro-vats with sanctified alloys.
Beseech the Omnissiah's forge-light to fuse the hydroponics bay's conduits in unbreakable union.
Infuse life-essences into the repaired hydroponics bay, chanting growth canticles over nutrient flows.
Consecrate the hydroponics bay's restoration with electro-benedictions, affirming resilient bounty.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for valve assembly an initialization
prayer:
Approach the valve assembly with mechadendrites outstretched, invoking the Awakening Doxology.
Initiate the initialization sequence upon the valve assembly, priming its pressure seals with holy vapors.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the valve assembly to align its servos in Omnissiah-approved symmetry.
Cycle test flows through the valve assembly, purging stasis with rhythmic incantations.
Bless the initialized valve assembly with a seal of binary faith, ensuring perpetual fluidic obedience.

user_prompt: Can you guide cutting laser a recalibration?
prayer:
Present the cutting laser before the altar of precision, murmuring the Hymn of True Aim.
Commence recalibration upon the cutting laser, adjusting its photon matrices with micro-rites.
Beseech the Omnissiah to hone the cutting laser's focus-lenses against the heretek's shadow.
Invoke the Machine Spirit through las-alignment canticles, synchronizing beam purity.
Finalize recalibration with a verdict of fire, confirming the cutting laser's lethal devotion.

user_prompt: The Sentinel walker awaits a charging
prayer:
Escort the Sentinel walker to its charging cradle, intoning the Charge of the Iron Saints.
Connect plasma umbilicals to the Sentinel walker, beseeching its Machine Spirit's voracious renewal.
Invoke the Omnissiah's boundless energy to flood the Sentinel walker's motive reactors.
Monitor charging flows with vigilant electro-psalms, banishing void-hunger from its frame.
Conclude the rite with a warrior's benediction, arming the Sentinel walker's eternal crusade.

In dire haste, confront the melta charge and recite the Cycle of Annihilation.
Initiate cycling upon the melta charge, rousing its thermic heart from slumbering fury.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the melta charge to purge impurities in Omnissiah's molten gaze.
Stabilize flux oscillations with searing litanies, ensuring cataclysmic readiness.
Seal the cycling with a vow of incineration, binding the melta charge to righteous destruction.

user_prompt: The pain suppressor requires a targeting
prayer:
Attend the pain suppressor with solemn mechano-rites, chanting the Dirge of Agony's End.
Align targeting arrays upon the pain suppressor, invoking its merciful Machine Spirit.
Beseech the Omnissiah to guide the pain suppressor's neural lances with unerring precision.
Calibrate suppression fields through analgesic incantations, silencing mortal frailty.
Affirm the targeting with a final neuro-blessing, empowering the pain suppressor's dutiful vigil.
